ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol used for trading */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry classification of the company */,
  "hq_location" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company's business and operations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company associated with the stock price */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the stock price was recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the stock price was recorded */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the stock price was recorded */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded on that date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company associated with the metrics */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price to earnings ratio */,
  "peg_ratio" REAL /* Price to earnings growth ratio */,
  "pb_ratio" REAL /* Price to book ratio */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend amount */,
  "payout_ratio" REAL /* Payout ratio of the dividend */,
  "value_metric" REAL /* Value metric for the company */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company */,
  "cash_flow" REAL /* Cash flow from operations */,
  "debt" REAL /* Total debt of the company */,
  "equity" REAL /* Total equity of the company */,
  "debt_to_equity" REAL /* Debt to equity ratio */,
  "return_on_equity" REAL /* Return on equity */,
  "return_on_assets" REAL /* Return on assets */,
  "current_ratio" REAL /* Current ratio */,
  "quick_ratio" REAL /* Quick ratio */,
  "gross_profit_margin" REAL /* Gross profit margin */,
  "net_profit_margin" REAL /* Net profit margin */,
  "operating_margin" REAL /* Operating margin */,
  "book_value_per_share" REAL /* Book value per share */,
  "insider_ownership" REAL /* Percentage of shares owned by insiders */,
  "institutional_ownership" REAL /* Percentage of shares owned by institutional investors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the industry belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industries_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "investor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the investor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the investor (e.g., individual, institutional) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the investor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the investor */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* Investment strategy of the investor */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the investor joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investor who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "total_investment" REAL /* Total amount invested in the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was last updated */,
  "performance" REAL /* Performance metric of the portfolio (e.g., percentage gain/loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_portfolios_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)
